items.title: Leakage-safe selection in a training pipeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  raw["raw features + labels"] --> split["train / val / test split"]
  split --> trainFold["training fold only"]
  trainFold --> prep["impute + scale + encode"]
  prep --> select["fit selector: filter / RFE / embedded"]
  select --> trainModel["train estimator on selected columns"]
  trainModel --> artifact["serialize Pipeline artifact"]
  artifact --> infer["inference: same selector + model"]
  split --> holdout["val / test: never fit selector"]
items.caption: Selectors learn from training data only; validation and test rows are transformed by the already-fitted selector.

items.title: Production stages: filter then wrapper
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  wide["500+ columns"] --> filter["filter: variance + MI top 100"]
  filter --> wrapper["RFECV on 100"]
  wrapper --> final["25 features + model"]
  final --> store["feature store contract"]
items.caption: Two-stage selection is common in production: cheap filters shrink the search space before expensive wrappers.
